'''鈭歮-r-v-ch''' ('''kamarvechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flat|flat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flat|flat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-r-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kamarvechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimarvechoko|thimarvechoko]] || [[word:jimarvechoko|jimarvechoko]] || [[word:shimarvechoko|shimarvechoko]] || [[word:kimarvechoko|kimarvechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
